adFreeTagline: Completely ad-free — no ads, no trackers, no sponsored clutter.

pdf-toolkit.seoTitle: PDF Toolkit — Ad-Free Android PDF Tools (Merge, Split, Sign)
pdf-toolkit.seoDescription: Free ad-free PDF toolkit for Android. Merge PDF, split PDF, sign PDF, and convert Markdown to PDF offline on your device — no ads, no uploads, no account.

Split PDFs by custom page ranges

faqs.question: Is PDF Toolkit free of ads?
faqs.answer: Yes. PDF Toolkit is completely ad-free. There are no banner ads, interstitial ads, video ads, or sponsored clutter — just local PDF tools.

faqs.question: Can I merge and split PDFs offline on Android?
faqs.answer: Yes. PDF Toolkit merges and splits PDFs entirely on device. Your documents are not uploaded to a server.

faqs.question: Does PDF Toolkit upload my documents?
faqs.answer: No. All merge, split, sign, and Markdown-to-PDF processing runs locally. Files stay on your phone or tablet.

faqs.answer: Core tools include merge PDF, split PDF, sign PDF with vector signatures, Markdown to PDF conversion, recent-document search, and local export/share.

howTo.name: How to merge PDF files on Android without ads
howTo.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one document entirely offline with the ad-free PDF Toolkit Android app.

steps.name: Open Merge
steps.text: Launch PDF Toolkit and tap the Merge tool from the home hub.

steps.name: Add PDFs
steps.text: Select the PDF files you want to combine from your device storage.

steps.name: Reorder pages
steps.text: Drag the files into the order you want them to appear in the merged document.

steps.name: Merge and save
steps.text: Tap Merge to combine the files locally, then save or share the finished PDF — no uploads, no ads.

faqs.question: Do my photos get uploaded when I compress them?
faqs.answer: No. Compression, EXIF removal, and duplicate detection run locally using Android storage APIs. There is no account or cloud sync for your photos.

faqs.answer: Yes. Photo Optimizer supports WebP (lossy or lossless), JPEG, and PNG with quality or max-size targets — and the app itself is ad-free.

howTo.name: How to batch compress photos on Android without ads
howTo.description: Shrink a batch of photos and strip metadata entirely offline with the ad-free Photo Optimizer Android app.

steps.name: Select photos
steps.text: Open Photo Optimizer and pick the photos you want to compress from your gallery.

steps.name: Choose format and quality
steps.text: Set the output format (WebP, JPEG, or PNG) and a quality or max-size target.

steps.name: Strip metadata
steps.text: Enable EXIF and GPS stripping if you want to remove location and camera data.

steps.name: Compress and export
steps.text: Run the batch to compress locally, review the before/after preview, then export — no cloud uploads, no ads.

howTo.name: How to scan a document to SVG on Android without ads
howTo.description: Capture a paper document, clean it up, and export a vector SVG with the ad-free Doc Scanner Vectorizer Android app.

steps.name: Capture the page
steps.text: Point the camera at the document; live boundary tracking detects the page edges automatically.

steps.name: Correct perspective
steps.text: Confirm or adjust the detected corners so the scan is squared and perspective-corrected.

steps.name: Apply cleanup
steps.text: Choose a cleanup filter such as grayscale or magic color to sharpen the page.

steps.name: Export as SVG
steps.text: Save the scan to history and export it as an SVG vector or share it as PNG — all on-device, ad-free.

wi-fi-drop.seoTitle: Wi-Fi Drop — Ad-Free Local File Transfer Over Wi-Fi

howTo.name: How to transfer files over local Wi-Fi on Android without ads
howTo.description: Send photos, videos, and folders between devices on the same Wi-Fi network with the ad-free Wi-Fi Drop Android app.

steps.name: Connect to Wi-Fi
steps.text: Make sure both devices are on the same local Wi-Fi network.

steps.name: Pick files to send
steps.text: Open Wi-Fi Drop, choose the files or folders you want to transfer, and start sending.

steps.name: Receive or Web Share
steps.text: On the other device, accept the transfer, or open the Web Share QR link in a browser to download.

steps.name: Confirm completion
steps.text: Watch live speed and progress; received files land in Downloads/Wifi-Drop with no cloud upload and no ads.

howTo.name: How to free up storage and remove duplicates on Android without ads
